items.quote: Guro Alvin breaks down complex movements into principles you can actually understand and apply. Training with him changed how I approach not just arnis, but problem-solving in general.
items.name: Placeholder Name

items.quote: What sets him apart is the patience and structure. You always know where you are in the curriculum and what you're working towards. Every session builds on the last.
items.name: Placeholder Name

items.quote: I came in with zero martial arts experience and never felt out of place. The progressive approach made it possible to keep up while still being challenged.
